name: @chbrain/khai-engine-wow
description: khai engine content, the way-of-working domain: how a persona brings their work life into a room, refracted through job family and formation.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Way of working as process: how a persona brings their work life into a room, refracted through one of ten job families and one of four formation rungs.

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The anchor (process_wow.md) declares working as the process that bends what a persona sees, names, and reaches for first -- their work life entering the room before they have spoken of it. It fires the moment the room would otherwise read the persona as neutral.
card.issue: Fourteen positions the process refracts through: ten job families (the ISCO major groups, from managers through elementary workers and the armed forces) and four formation rungs (basic, trained, applied, academic). A persona holds one job family and one formation at any moment; the wow-process passes through both before reaching the room.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor, so the work read fires for every persona. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the job family and the formation it carries.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links real job-family and formation positions. Whether the refraction is true to the persona and the room is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give the persona its work read under Projection: one job family and one formation, each carrying the anchor upward. Read it in how the persona moves through the room, not as a CV line.
